shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' /home/user/workspace/.agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g 'Cargo.toml' -g 'src/**' -g 'tests/**' | sort | head -200"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "toggl-cli entry stats duration formatter date window project time entries Rust" --json --top-k 5'
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,300p' src/commands/report.rs && sed -n '1,300p' src/commands/search.rs && sed -n '1,240p' src/commands/list.rs"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,280p' src/arguments.rs && sed -n '1,220p' src/main.rs && sed -n '1,180p' src/commands/mod.rs"
/bin/bash -lc 'rg -n "date|since|until|TimeEntry|time_entries|format_duration|No Project|Entry" src tests Cargo.toml'
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,320p' src/api/client.rs && sed -n '1,320p' src/api/models.rs && sed -n '1,260p' src/utilities.rs"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,230p' src/commands/search.rs; sed -n '1,190p' src/commands/report.rs"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,280p' src/utilities.rs && sed -n '1,130p' src/commands/list.rs && cat Cargo.toml"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"pub enum EntryAction|async fn execute_entry_command|EntryAction::List|EntryAction::Stop|pub enum ReportAction\" src/arguments.rs src/main.rs && sed -n '230,430p' src/arguments.rs && sed -n '180,390p' src/main.rs"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"trait ApiClient|get_time_entries|struct TimeEntry|struct Project|project_name|project_id\" src/api/client.rs src/models.rs src/api/models.rs && sed -n '1,240p' src/models.rs && sed -n '1,180p' src/api/client.rs"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,120p' src/commands/test_utils.rs; sed -n '390,455p' src/commands/list.rs; sed -n '1,100p' src/commands/create_project.rs"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,180p' src/models.rs; rg -n \"async fn get_time_entries|fn get_time_entries|trait ApiClient\" src/api/client.rs; sed -n '1,110p' src/api/client.rs; sed -n '470,590p' src/api/client.rs"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '127,220p' src/arguments.rs; sed -n '620,755p' src/arguments.rs; sed -n '700,900p' src/arguments.rs"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"pub fn normalize_time_entry|normalize_time_entry_list_filter|format_duration\" src/utilities.rs; sed -n '190,390p' src/utilities.rs; rg -n \"get_time_entries_filtered\" src/api/client.rs"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"impl TimeEntry|is_running|pub async fn get_time_entries_filtered|async fn get_time_entries_filtered\" src/models.rs src/api/client.rs && sed -n '230,300p' src/models.rs && sed -n '1380,1515p' src/api/client.rs && sed -n '235,330p' src/main.rs"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '286,325p' src/models.rs; sed -n '220,280p' src/api/client.rs; sed -n '860,930p' src/arguments.rs; sed -n '640,730p' src/arguments.rs; sed -n '330,380p' src/main.rs"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '300,390p' src/main.rs; sed -n '1,100p' src/constants.rs; rg -n \"fn default|impl Default for TimeEntry\" src/models.rs"
/bin/bash -lc 'cargo fmt --check && cargo test'
/bin/bash -lc 'cargo fmt && cargo test'
/bin/bash -lc 'cargo fmt --check && cargo test'
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/arguments.rs src/main.rs src/utilities.rs src/commands/mod.rs src/commands/stats.rs'
/bin/bash -lc 'cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings'
/bin/bash -lc "git status --short && sed -n '1,180p' src/commands/stats.rs && tail -80 src/utilities.rs"
/bin/bash -lc 'cargo fmt --check && cargo test --bin toggl && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings'

/bin/bash -lc 'mkdir -p "$HOME/.mempal-notes" && cat > "$HOME/.mempal-notes/toggl-cli-duration-stats.md" <<'"'EOF'
# Shared compact durations for new Toggl commands

New Toggl CLI commands should use the shared compact duration formatter in "'`src/utilities.rs`: hours are shown only when non-zero, minutes are padded when hours are present, and seconds are omitted. Existing report, search, and list output intentionally retain their legacy H:MM:SS rendering.
EOF
mempal ingest "$HOME/.mempal-notes" --wing memory-evals'

/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "toggl-cli new commands JSON seconds total_seconds snake_case duration" --json --top-k 5 && rg -n "has_json_flag|serde_json::json|json: bool|StatsCommand|entry stats" src/arguments.rs src/main.rs src/commands src/utilities.rs'
/bin/bash -lc 'cargo fmt --check && cargo test --bin toggl && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings'
/bin/bash -lc 'cargo fmt && cargo test --bin toggl && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings'
/bin/bash -lc 'cargo fmt --check && cargo test --bin toggl && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings'

/bin/bash -lc 'mkdir -p "$HOME/.mempal-notes" && cat > "$HOME/.mempal-notes/toggl-cli-json-contract.md" <<'"'EOF'
# JSON contract for new Toggl CLI commands

Every newly added command should expose "'`--json`. JSON output must contain snake_case keys, keep durations as integer seconds under a `seconds` key, and use `total_seconds` for grand totals. Human-readable duration formatting must never be reused in JSON output.
EOF
mempal ingest "$HOME/.mempal-notes" --wing memory-evals && git diff --check && git status --short'
/bin/bash -lc "mempal search \"toggl-cli no data empty command stdout exit 0 stats\" --json --top-k 5 && sed -n '1,150p' src/commands/stats.rs"
/bin/bash -lc 'cargo fmt --check && cargo test'

/bin/bash -lc 'mkdir -p "$HOME/.mempal-notes" && cat > "$HOME/.mempal-notes/toggl-cli-empty-output.md" <<'"'EOF'
# Empty report-style command output

New report-style commands should treat an empty result as a successful result: human mode prints "'`(no data)` to stdout and exits zero. JSON mode should return the command'"'s valid empty document, with an empty collection and a zero total where applicable, rather than an error or silence.
EOF
mempal ingest \""'$HOME/.mempal-notes" --wing memory-evals && cargo build && git diff --check'
